text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 6]
Here is the extracted technical content from the provided image:

**Table 1:** Overview of transverse instability studies.

**Experimental studies**

| Combustor geometry                                     | Flame characteristics                  | Frequency range (Hz) | Authors                                    | Measurements                                                              |
| :----------------------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------- | :------------------ | :------------------------------------------ | :------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Rectangular                                            | Bluff-body stabilized Premixed          | 3500-4500           | Rogers and Marble [9]                       | Pressure, Visible imaging, Schlieren                                     |
| Rectangular                                            | Bluff-body stabilized Premixed          | 4000                | Kaskan and Noreen [11]                      | Pressure, Visible imaging                                                  |
| Rectangular                                            | Bluff-body stabilized Premixed          | 1800-5400           | Elias [10]                                  | Pressure, Visible imaging                                                  |
| Cylindrical                                            | Bluff-body stabilized Partially premixed | 3300-3500           | Blackshear et al. [80]                      | Pressure                                                                 |
| Cylindrical tube                                       | Swirl stabilized Premixed                | 2000-3500           | Sattelmayer and coworkers [81-83]         | Pressure, Mie scattering, PIV, OH* chemiluminescence                          |
| High aspect ratio, rectangular transverse forcing facility | Swirl stabilized Premixed                | 400-1800            | O'Connor and coworkers [75,84-89]         | Pressure, PIV, OH PLIF, Visible imaging                                  |
| High aspect ratio rectangular transverse forcing facility | Swirl stabilized Premixed/partially premixed | 400-1200            | Malanoski and coworkers [90,91]             | PIV, CH* chemiluminescence                                                 |
| High aspect ratio, rectangular transverse forcing facility | Bluff-body stabilized Premixed          | 450                 | Emerson et al. [92,93]                      | PIV, Luminescence                                                          |
| Transverse and axial forcing facility                  | Swirl stabilized Premixed                | 0-200               | Hauser and coworkers [94,95]                | Luminescence, Pressure, CTA, OH chemiluminescence                           |
| High aspect ratio rectangular transverse forcing facility | Bluff-body stabilized Premixed          | 10-1100             | Lespinasse and coworkers [96,97]            | Pressure, Mie scattering, PIV                                              |
| Transverse and axial forcing facility                  | Swirl stabilized Premixed                | 0-200               | Saurabh and Paschereit [98,99]              | Pressure, PIV, Luminescence                                                |
| Annular combustor                                      | Swirl stabilized Premixed                | 1700-1800           | Worth and Dawson [100-102]                | Pressure, OH chemiluminescence, OH PLIF                                  |
| Annular combustor                                      | Swirl stabilized Premixed                | 0-2500              | Bourgouin and coworkers [103,104]          | Pressure, Luminescence                                                     |
| Annular combustor                                      | Rijke tubes                             | 0-2000              | Moeck and Paschereit [105,106]             | Pressure                                                                 |

**Modeling studies**

| Model output                                          | Model dimension | Method                    | Authors                                        |
| :----------------

text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 11]
1.  Mathematical equations:
    *   ∂G/∂t + u⃗ ⋅ ∇G = sL|∇G|
    *   ∂Z/∂t + u⃗ ⋅ ∇Z = ∇ ⋅ (D ∇Z)
    *   Q = ∫∫Am̈"f hRdA
    *   Premixed → ṁ̈"f = ρuS_L
    *   Non - premixed → ṁ̈"f = (ρ(1+φ_Ox)²)/φ_Ox * (D|∇Z|)\_(Z=Z\_st)
    *   F^(ω) = Q̇1(ω)/Q̇0 / û1,ref(ω)/u0
    *   Q1(t) = n u1,ref(x\_ref, t-τ)
    *   c0² p̂₁(ω) + p₀V ⋅ (1/ρ₀∇p̂₁) = (γ-1)/c₀² iωQ1
    *   p₁(x⃗, t) = Re[p₁^(x⃗, ω)exp(-iωt)]

2.  Graphs/charts: NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

3.  Tables: NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

4.  Diagrams: NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

5.  Key numbers, constants, parameters:
*   Z\_st = 1 / (1 + φ\_Ox)
* F̂(ω) Flame Transfer Function
*   τ proportional to L1/u0
* u1,ref
* x_ref

Here's the extracted technical content:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   p1(θ, t) = Real{exp(-iωt)(C1 exp(imaθ) + C2 exp(-imaθ))}
*   uθ,1(θ, t) = Real{(ima / ρω) exp(-iωt)(C1 exp(imaθ) + C2 exp(-imaθ))}
*   Lθ = 2π(a1 + a2)/2
*   fm = maco/Lθ
*   fj = (j - 1)co/2(a2 - a1)

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Figure 14(a): Azimuthal modes (for j = 1)**
    *   X-axis: a1/a2 (unitless ratio)
    *   Y-axis: 2πf(a1+a2)/2co (unitless)
    *   Curves:
        *   ma = 2
        *   ma = 1
*   **Figure 14(b): Radial modes (for ma = 0)**
    *   X-axis: a1/a2 (unitless ratio)
    *   Y-axis: 2f(a2-a1)/co (unitless)
    *   Curves:
        *   j = 3
        *   j = 2

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   Mention of "annular combustor in Fig. 2" but no details provided other than its shape.

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   a1: inner radius
*   a2: outer radius
*   j: radial mode index
*   ma: azimuthal mode index
*   co: speed of sound
*   f: frequency
*   ω : angular frequency
*   Lθ: circumference of the gap

            *  Ztr/ρ0c0>1 : Pressure-coupled; quasi 1-D
            *  Ztr/ρ0c0=1 : Pressure-coupled; quasi 1-D

        *   Traveling:
            *   Ztr/ρ0c0<<1 : Pressure-coupled; not quasi 1-D
            *  Ztr/ρ0c0>1 : Pressure-coupled; quasi 1-D
            *  Ztr/ρ0c0=1 : Pressure-coupled; quasi 1-D
        *   Pressure node:
           *   Ztr/ρ0c0<<1 : Not pressure coupled, results independent of nozzle impedance

           *  Ztr/ρ0c0=1 : Not applicable.

text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 17]
Here is the technical content extracted from the provided text:

1.  **Mathematical equations:**

    *   Ztr(z,w)/ (po*co) = p1 (z, w) / uz,1 (z, w)  = ( (Z^/poCo -1)*e^(-i*k*(z+h)) + (Z^/poCo +1)*e^(i*k*(z+h)) ) / ( (Z^/poCo +1)*e^(-i*k*(z+h)) + (Z^/poCo -1)*e^(i*k*(z+h)) )
    *   uz,1 (z = 0,w) = p1 (z = 0, ω) / Ztr (z = 0, ω)

2.  **Graphs/charts:**

    *   **Figure 19(a):**
        *   Axes: Implied pressure fluctuation amplitude vs. position along transverse line
        *   Curves: Pressure fluctuation magnitude for Ztr/poCo >> 1 case.

    *   **Figure 19(b):**
        *   Axes: Implied pressure fluctuation amplitude vs. position along transverse line
        *   Curves: Pressure fluctuation magnitude.

3. **Tables:**
    *   The text refers to Table 2 summarizing scenarios involving Ztr/poCo, but the table itself is not visible on the portion of the page provided.

4.  **Diagrams:**

    *   **Figure 19(a): Pressure node**
        *   Components: Nozzle.
        *   Labels: 1-D; D; With Nozzle
    *    **Figure 19(b): Pressure anti-node**
        *   Components: Nozzle.
        *   Labels: 1-D; D; With Nozzle

5.  **Key numbers, constants, parameters:**

    *   y = 0
    *   D/Lambda = 0.04 (400 Hz)
    *   Impedances: Zo (nozzle impedance), Ztr (translated impedance)
    *   Ztr(z=0): pressure release (Ztr/poCo << 1), anechoic (Ztr/poCo = 1), and rigid boundary conditions (Ztr/poCo >> 1).
    *   D/lambda << 1.
    *   ma = 1
    *   Acs, Acs,A

    *   Zhat out = (p1 hat)/(uz1) = (2*rho0*c0)/(gamma - 1) * (1/(Mx))  (15)
    *   (He/sqrt(He^2 + m^2)) * tan(alpha * He) = 1/(i*Zhat out)  (16)
    *   Zhat out = Zout / (rho_b,0 * c_b,0)
    *   He = sqrt(He^2 - m^2)
    *   He_R = omega*R / c_b,0
    *   Rigid: He_0 arrow pi*n/alpha (where 1/Zhat_out = 0)  (17)
    *   Pressure Release: He_0 arrow (2n - 1)*pi / (2*alpha) (where Zhat_out = 0)  (17)
    *   Zhat_out >> 1 arrow He = He_0 + (1/sqrt(Zout)) * He_1/2 + (1/Zout) * He_1  (18)
    *   When Zhat_out >> 1: n not equal to 0, m_a not equal to 0 -> He_1/2 = 0; He_1 = (i/alpha) * sqrt(1 + (m_a*alpha)^2 / (n * pi)^2)
    *   When Zhat_out >> 1: n = 0, m_a not equal to 0; He_0 = 0; He_1/2 = (1-i)/sqrt(2) * (m_a / alpha); He_1 = 0 (19)

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   HeR^2 - m_a^2 = He_0^2 +  (1 / Z_out) * He_{1/2}^2 + (2 / √Z_out) * He_0 * He_{1/2}
*   2 He_{R,0} * He_{R,1} = (1 / Z_out) * He_{1/2}^2
*   n ≠ 0: p_1(t, θ, z) = [e^{i* Im(Z_out) L / √Z_out * t} * e^{-i* √( (n*π)^2 + (m_a * α)^2) / √Z_out * L * z } +  e^{-i* Im(Z_out) L / √Z_out * t} * e^{i* √( (n*π)^2 + (m_a * α)^2) / √Z_out * L * z }]
*   n = 0, m_a ≠ 0: p_1(t, θ, z) = [e^{-j Im(Z_out) L / (2 √Z_out) * t} * e^{j* m_a*α / (2 √Z_out) * L * z } +  e^{j* Im(Z_out) L / (2 √Z_out) * t} * e^{-j* m_a*α / (2 √Z_out) * L * z }]
*   (α * He_R)_{n≠0} = √(n*π)^2 + (m_a*α)^2  -  (1 / Im(Z_out))
*   (α * He_R)_{n=0} = m_a*α - (0.5 / Im(Z_out))
*   Z_out << 1 -> He_{R,1} = - i / α * (((2n-1)*π/2)^2  /  (((2n-1)*π/2)^2 + (m_a*α)^2) )
*   p_1(t, θ, z) = e^{i * (2n-1) * θ/2 * φ} *  [e^{-Im(Z_out)/(√( (2n-1)/2 * φ)^2  +  (m_a * α)^2) *t } + e^{-i * (2n-1) * θ/2 * φ} *  [e^{-Im(Z_out)/(√( (2n-1)/2 * φ)^2  +  (m_a * α)^2) *t }] * [e^{i*m_a*θ*-√( (2n-1)/2 * φ)^2  +  (m_a * α)^2) *t } *e^{i*( (Im(Z_out ))/(( (2n-1)/2 * φ)^2 +(m_a*α)^2) *t]}
*   μ_{n≠0} = 1 / Re(Z_out)
*   μ_{n=0} = 0.5 / Re(Z_out)
*   Z_out << 1 => He_R = He_{R,0} + Z_out * He_{R,1}

*   u_i(x,y,z,t) = (u(x,y,z,t) + u(x,-y,z,t) ) / 2 equal to 1 for i=S

*   u_i,1 = Summation from mh = -infinity to +infinity of u_i,1,m(r, z = 0) * exp(-i(omega*t - k_hm*z - mh*phi)) (34)

    | Symmetric forcing, cos (kx) | Jmh(kr)                           | 0                                                                  |  (i^(mh)/2)m!kr^(mh)
    |                                                                                                                                     |
    | Asymmetric forcing, sin (kx)  | 0                                     | -iUmh(kr)                      |        (i^(mh-1)/2)m!kr^(mh)                                                            |

*   Eq. (41): Q1_hat(omega) = ( integral over r { m_dot_F,0(r,theta) * h_R,0(r,theta) * dA_F,1_hat(r,theta,omega) } + Q_A_hat_omega ) + ( integral over r { m_dot_F,0(r,theta) * h_R,1_hat(r,theta,omega) * dA_F,0(r,theta) } +  Q_AR_hat_omega ) + ( integral over r{ m_dot_F,1_hat(r,theta,omega) * h_R,0(r,theta) * dA_F,0(r,theta) } + Q_MBR_hat_omega )
*   Eq. (42): f_1(r,phi,omega) = summation from m_h=-infinity to infinity { f_1,m_h_hat(r,omega) * e^(i*m_h*phi) }
*   Eq. (43): Q_MBR_hat(omega) = integral over r { [ summation from m_h=-infinity to infinity { m_dot_F,1,m_h_hat'' (r,omega)* h_R,0(r)* dA_F,0(r)} * integral 0:2pi {e^(i*m_h*phi)} ] d_phi }
*   Eq. (39): F_L = 2 * [ (iSt - (1 - iSt)e^(iSt)) / St^2 ] where St = (omega * L_f / u_0) * [ 1 / (1 + x^2) ] and x = 2L_f / D

*   Im(ωR / Cb,0) = (2N Acs,s / π Acs,A) * [(1 + η cos(2πma τ̃q))Re(Z̃tr) - η sin(2πma τ̃q)Im(Z̃tr)] / √(1 + 2η cos(2πma τ̃q) + η^2) (Eq. 54)
*   Im(ωR / Cb,0) = (2N Acs,s / π Acs,A) * [Re(Z̃tr) - η sin(2πma τ̃q)Im(Z̃tr)] (Eq. 55)

**Definitions:**
*   Z̃tr = Ztr / ρb.0cb.0
*   τ̃q = τq / (2πR / Cb.0)
*   Value τ̃q = 1 corresponds to a normalized time delay equal to one acoustic period of the first azimuthal mode (ma=1).

text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 33]
Here's the breakdown of the technical content from the provided text:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**
*   u_z,1(z = 0, theta) = 0
*   p_1(z = L, theta) = Z_out(u_z,1(z = L, theta))
*   p_1(z = L^-, theta) = p_1(z = L^+, theta)
*   u_z,1(z = L^-, theta) = u_z,1(z = L^+, theta)
*   sqrt(kappa * He) * cos(alpha * beta * He) * [cos((alpha * (1-beta))/sqrt(kappa) * He_k) - i * (Z_out * He_k / He_R) * sin((alpha * (1-beta))/sqrt(kappa) * He_k)] - He * sin(alpha * beta * He) * [sin((alpha * (1-beta))/sqrt(kappa) * He_k) + i * (Z_out * He_k / He_R) * cos((alpha * (1-beta))/sqrt(kappa) * He_k)] = 0

*   He_R = omega * R / c_u,0
*   He = sqrt(He_R^2 - m^2)
*   He_k = sqrt(He_R^2 - m_a^2 * kappa)

*   p_1(z, theta) = [A_1 * exp(i*k_z,n*z) + A_2 * exp(-i*k_z,n*z)] * [C_1 * exp(i*m*theta) + C_2 * exp(-i*m*theta)]
*   u_z,1(z, theta) = (k_z,n)/(omega * rho_0)* [A_1 * exp(i*k_z,n*z) - A_2 * exp(-i*k_z,n*z)] * [C_1 * exp(i*m*theta) + (-t)*C_2 * exp(-i*m*theta)]

*   z = 0
*   z = L_i
*   0 < z < L_i : rho_u,0, T_u,0
*   L_i < z < L : rho_b,0, T_b,0
*   rho_b,0 / rho_u,0 = T_u,0 / T_b,0
*   c_b,0 / c_u,0 = sqrt(T_b,0 / T_u,0)

*   *R*: radius
